name: XState Deadlock Free
description: XState machines must be verified to be deadlock-free — every non-final state must have at least one enabled transition.
rationale: A deadlocked state machine leaves the UI stuck with no way forward. This is especially critical for multi-step flows (checkout, onboarding, wizards) where users cannot recover without a page refresh.

examples.passes: Formalize(wizardMachine) → Verify(no deadlocks: every non-final state has an outgoing transition)
examples.fails: A wizard machine where the 'review' state has no transitions when the cart is empty
